product_overview: ProConnect is a web app for industry professionals to discover authored posts, share temporary status updates, participate in challenges, and communicate in real-time via direct and group messaging.
core_goals: Discover and browse industry posts to find relevant professionals and content
Start and maintain real-time direct or group conversations, including sharing media
Publish and view temporary status updates to share short-lived activity
Participate in coding or technical challenges and view active challenge details
Create and complete a basic user profile through onboarding to get started

features.name: Landing / Product Overview
features.description: Public landing page that introduces the product, highlights features, and directs users toward account access.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See hero and features overview -> Choose to start account access -> Navigate to /login

features.name: Onboarding (Profile Setup)
features.description: Guided profile setup where users provide a display name, role, bio, and profile image to complete their account.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Provide display name and role -> Add a short bio -> Upload a profile image -> Submit profile -> Land on /chat and see profile reflected
Navigate to /onboarding -> Leave a required field blank -> Attempt to submit profile -> See a validation error prompting completion

features.name: Real-time Discovery Feed
features.description: Browse posts from professionals, apply filters, and launch conversations based on content you discover.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> Scroll through the feed -> Filter posts by user -> Open a post to start a direct chat -> Select the direct chat -> Type and send a message -> See the sent message in the conversation

features.name: Instant Messaging
features.description: Real-time direct and group messaging with text and media attachments and message delivery visibility.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> Select a chat -> Type and send a text message -> See message delivery status update
Navigate to /chat -> Select a chat -> Attach a media file -> Send the message with attachment -> See the attachment appear in the conversation
Navigate to /chat -> Select a chat -> Attempt to send an empty message -> See validation preventing the send

features.name: Status Updates
features.description: View and inspect temporary status updates shared by connections.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> View list of status updates -> Open a specific status -> See full status content and author

features.name: Challenges Arena
features.description: Browse active coding and technical challenges and view challenge details.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> Enter the challenges room -> View list of active challenges -> Open an active challenge to see details

routes.description: Landing page with hero and features overview.
User login page with Google Auth.
Main dashboard containing Feed, Chat, Groups, Status, and Challenges.
User onboarding flow to set up profile.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login using Google OAuth via Supabase.

features.name: Real-time Discovery Feed
features.description: Browse and interact with posts from industry professionals.
user_interactions: Click on a post to start a direct chat

features.name: Instant Messaging
features.description: Real-time direct and group messaging with media support.
user_interactions: Select a chat from the sidebar

features.name: Status Updates
user_interactions: Click to view a specific status

features.name: Challenges Arena
features.description: Participate in coding or technical challenges.
